---
title-block: false
description: "Curriculum vitae for Lewis Kwon."
---

# CV

[Download CV](files/cv-lewis-kwon-public.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

## Position

Senior Deputy Director, Division of Infectious Disease Control, KDCA  
Aug. 2025-Present

## Education

- Ph.D. Public Policy, KDI School of Public Policy and Management, 2025  
  *Dissertation: Three Essays on Immunization: Impact, Perception, and the Decision-Making Process*
- MBA, Rotterdam School of Management, Erasmus University, 2018
- Master of Development Policy, KDI School of Public Policy and Management, 2017
- B.A. Economics and English, Handong Global University, 2008

## Fields of Expertise

Viral hepatitis elimination; immunization policy; adult vaccination; epidemic intelligence; surveillance-system integration; emergency response governance; vaccine hesitancy; public health decision-making; global health security capacity-building.

## Awards

- KDCA Commissioner's Award, 2025
- Order of Civil Merit by the President of Korea, Sierra Leone Ebola response contribution, 2015
- Health and Welfare Minister's Award, 2007
